name: Lunar Glow Foundation
description: A lightweight, buildable foundation with a dewy finish. Infused with hyaluronic acid for all-day hydration. Available in 24 shades. Best for normal to dry skin.

name: Midnight Matte Lipstick
description: Long-wearing matte lipstick that lasts up to 12 hours. Enriched with vitamin E. Available in 18 bold and neutral shades. Transfer-proof formula.

name: Stardust Setting Powder
description: Ultra-fine translucent setting powder that blurs pores and locks in makeup. Oil-free formula perfect for oily and combination skin. Gives a soft-focus finish.

name: Eclipse Eye Palette
description: 12-shade eyeshadow palette with a mix of mattes, shimmers, and metallics. Highly pigmented, blendable formula. Inspired by the night sky. Includes a mirror and dual-ended brush.

name: Cosmic Blush Duo
description: Two complementary blush shades in one compact — one matte, one shimmer. Buildable color with a natural flush. Works on all skin tones.

name: Nova Hydrating Primer
description: Silicone-free hydrating primer that smooths skin and extends makeup wear. Contains squalane and niacinamide. Great for dry and sensitive skin.

name: Twilight Mascara
description: Volumizing and lengthening mascara with a curved brush. Smudge-proof and flake-free. Buildable from natural to dramatic. Easy to remove with warm water.

name: Moonbeam Highlighter
description: Cream-to-powder highlighter with a lit-from-within glow. Can be applied with fingers or brush. Available in 4 shades. Buildable without glitter chunks.

name: Nebula Lip Gloss
description: Non-sticky lip gloss with a high-shine finish. Infused with peptides for plumping effect. Available in 10 shades from clear to tinted. Vanilla-mint scent.

name: Dark Matter Contour Kit
description: 3-shade contour palette with a matte bronzer, contour shade, and highlight. Includes an angled brush. Blendable and buildable. Works on light to deep skin tones.
